description: A fresco showing a formal court audience in an ornate interior with gilded coffered ceiling and marble columns. At the right, an enthroned figure in red robes (likely a pope or cardinal) receives a group of courtiers. Several figures in richly colored garments stand before him, including men in blue and red robes. The architectural setting is grand with classical arches and decorative panels in blue and gold. The scene captures a moment of diplomatic or familial ceremony.
